response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level software engineer with strong TypeScript and technical leadership skills, he falls short of the core GenAI requirements. The role strictly requires 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions, whereas his AI experience appears limited to his most recent position. Furthermore, he lacks required expertise in Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, making him a poor fit for this specialized AI role.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering experience with deep expertise in TypeScript and Node.js.
Proven track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and establishing engineering best practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
concerns: Fails to meet the strict requirement of 8+ years of experience developing AI-driven solutions.
Lacks any mentioned experience with Python, a critical required language for this GenAI role.
No demonstrated background in vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines.
